pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i wake up and for a split second i forget... and then it hits me all over again. everything feels so empty. i don't even know why i'm getting out of bed or eating or doing any of this stuff. it feels like i'm just a ghost haunting my own life. nothing matters anymore.

pool.baseline: i was just reading about entropy and the heat death of the universe... it just makes everything feel so pointless. like, why even bother with anything? every single thing we do, every struggle, every feeling, it's all just gonna be erased by the void anyway. it feels like we're just glitches in a system that doesn't even care we exist.

pool.baseline: i honestly don't even know why i'm still doing this. everything just collapsed. my lab lost the grant, my advisor basically stopped responding to my emails, and i feel like i've wasted years of my life on something that was never going to work out. i'm just so incredibly tired. not just sleepy, like... deep in my bones tired. i feel like i've reached the end of the road and there's nowhere left to go.

pool.baseline: The candles have all guttered out, leaving me in a darkness that feels more honest than the light ever was. He is gone, and with him, the very soul of this house. I look at the heavy velvet curtains and the cold marble, and I realize... there is nothing left for me here but the ghost of a person. I feel as though I am already fading, like mist over the moors, and perhaps it would be kinder to simply let the night take me entirely.

pool.baseline: everything feels so empty lately. i used to feel like there was this constant hum of music in my head, something driving me, you know? but now its just... silence. like the person who used to make things is just gone. i look in the mirror and i dont even see a person anymore, just a hollow shell where the art used to be. it feels pointless to keep going when there is nothing left inside to express.
